PowerShell($tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $tcp.Connect\("localhost", 6379\); "Redis port 6379: OPEN" } catch { "Redis port 6379: CLOSED/unreachable" } finally { $tcp.Close\(\) })

PowerShell($tcp2 = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $tcp2.Connect\("localhost", 5432\); "Postgres port 5432: OPEN" } catch { "Postgres port 5432: CLOSED/unreachable" } finally { $tcp2.Close\(\) })

PowerShell($tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; $tcp.Connect\("localhost", 6379\); $stream = $tcp.GetStream\(\); $writer = New-Object System.IO.StreamWriter\($stream\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $writer.WriteLine\("PING"\); $writer.Flush\(\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; if \($stream.DataAvailable\) { $reader.ReadLine\(\) } else { "Redis not responding to PING" }; $tcp.Close\(\))

PowerShell($port = 8080; $connection = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($connection\) { $pid = $connection.OwningProcess; $proc = Get-Process -Id $pid -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Port $port is held by PID $pid — $\($proc.Name\) \($\($proc.Path\)\)" } else { "Nothing listening on $port" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $proc = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "PID=$\($_.OwningProcess\) Name=$\($proc.Name\) Path=$\($proc.Path\)" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $proc = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "State=$\($_.State\) PID=$\($_.OwningProcess\) Name=$\($proc.Name\)" })
